themes: model competition (GPT-5.5 imminent, xAI voice APIs)

worthClicking.author: @ClaudeDevs
worthClicking.why: Claude Code now shows session recaps when you switch focus — directly addresses multi-agent workflow friction that power users have complained about.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Concrete math on why the $200/mo Max plan is 75x cheaper than API rates for heavy Claude Code users — directly relevant to pricing strategy conversations with prospects.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Sharp read on OpenAI's compute reset announcement as a deliberate poaching signal aimed at rate-limited Claude Code power users.

worthClicking.author: @levie
worthClicking.why: Aaron Levie articulates clearly why chatbot→agent automation requires dedicated internal owners, not self-service — useful framing for enterprise sales conversations.

worthClicking.author: @DataChaz
worthClicking.why: The 'Find Skills' meta-skill for Claude Code is a genuine productivity unlock — install command included, high engagement confirms real utility.

worthClicking.author: @kloss_xyz
worthClicking.why: Google open-sourcing DESIGN.md while Anthropic rate-limits Claude Design is a pointed competitive framing that the creative AI community is picking up on.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Lovable's $6.6B valuation vs. a 5-API-call exploit of customer credentials is the clearest summary of the vibe-coded security problem in this cycle.

worthClicking.author: @kimmonismus
worthClicking.why: GPT-Image-2 self-critiques and iterates on its own output — if accurate, that's a meaningful capability jump for product teams using image generation.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: LinkedIn, Anthropic, and Rippling are all converging on requiring PMs to ship prototypes — concrete data points for anyone rethinking PM hiring or role definitions.

worthClicking.author: @aakashgupta
worthClicking.why: Yann LeCun leaving Meta and immediately shipping a working JEPA from raw pixels is a genuine architectural-bet story worth watching as a counternarrative to transformer dominance.

voices.why: Consistently translates raw AI news into product and business strategy implications — the Claude Code pricing math and OpenAI compute-reset reads are both sharp.
Box CEO with a clear-eyed enterprise perspective on the chatbot-to-agent gap; high signal for sales enablement framing.
Official Anthropic dev account shipping real Claude Code UX updates — must-follow for product feature tracking.
Stripe product lead actively recruiting builders of economic agents — useful pulse on where agentic commerce infrastructure is heading.

examples: RoundtableSpace crypto/BTC price takes and motivational filler
aakashgupta newsletter self-promotion posts (multiple identical CTAs)
minchoi vibe-coded game demo thread (low engagement, not relevant)
